query:
ALTER TABLE ai_assessments 
ADD COLUMN total_loss_indicated TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN structural_damage_severity ENUM('none', 'minor', 'moderate', 'severe', 'catastrophic') DEFAULT 'none',
ADD COLUMN estimated_vehicle_value INT,
ADD COLUMN repair_to_value_ratio INT,
ADD COLUMN total_loss_reasoning TEXT,
ADD COLUMN damaged_components_json TEXT;
